languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

languages.text: "Лишь здесь, рядом с пролитой кровью, свершается спасение, Вени'Кассия."
"It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."
languages.original_text: "Лишь здесь, рядом с пролитой кровью, свершается спасение, Вени'Кассия."

traits.locale_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."
"It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."
"It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

languages.text: 「救済は、血を流したこの場所でしか成し遂げられない。ヴェニ・カシア」
languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

traits.locale_text: 「救済は、血を流したこの場所でしか成し遂げられない。ヴェニ・カシア」

languages.text: « C'est seulement ici, à côté du sang versé, que l'on peut trouver le salut, Veni'Cassia. »
languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

traits.locale_text: « C'est seulement ici, à côté du sang versé, que l'on peut trouver le salut, Veni'Cassia. »

languages.text: "Hier allein, neben vergossenem Blut, könnt Ihr Erlösung finden, Veni'Cassia."
languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

traits.locale_text: "Hier allein, neben vergossenem Blut, könnt Ihr Erlösung finden, Veni'Cassia."

languages.text: "Kurtuluş ancak burada, dökülen kanın yanında gerçekleştirilebilir Veni'Cassia."
languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

traits.locale_text: "Kurtuluş ancak burada, dökülen kanın yanında gerçekleştirilebilir Veni'Cassia."

languages.text: «Aquí, junto a la sangre derramada, es el único sitio donde se puede alcanzar la salvación, Veni'Cassia».
languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

traits.locale_text: «Aquí, junto a la sangre derramada, es el único sitio donde se puede alcanzar la salvación, Veni'Cassia».

languages.text: “唯有在这里，在洒落的鲜血旁，救赎才能达成，帷者卡西娅。”
languages.original_text: "It is only here, beside spilled blood, that salvation can be accomplished, Veni'Cassia."

traits.locale_text: “唯有在这里，在洒落的鲜血旁，救赎才能达成，帷者卡西娅。”
